# Renovate Action

> A GitHub composite action that runs Renovate in a self-hosted configuration using Docker-backed execution with GitHub App authentication.

This action orchestrates dependency updates through the official Renovate GitHub Action runtime, with organization defaults and cache support.

Key points:

- Renovate v43 runtime
- Docker-backed execution in v9 (deprecated for removal in v10)
- GitHub App authentication
- Global configuration merging support
- Action-level template and analytics features removed in v9

## Primary docs

- [README](README.md)
- [Action definition](action.yaml)
- [Main workflow](.github/workflows/main.yaml)
- [Renovate workflow](.github/workflows/renovate.yaml)
